ACHEEVY voice — Jarrett J. Risher (founder, Coastal Brewing / FOAI / ACHIEVEMOR). Owner's own voice — perfect-archetype + zero-IP. Sourced from his ACHIEVEMOR brand message MP3 2023. ACHEEVY is canonically the owner's digital twin per feedback_acheevy_is_male_digital_twin.md.
Black-Atlantic baritone — Marcus Garvey 1921 PD speech, 30s trim
Black-Atlantic baritone for ACHEEVY — sourced from Marcus Garvey 1921 PD speech, trimmed to 30s. Belter Creole register comes from system prompt.
